title: Gorgeous Shattering Moroccan Refried Beans Tagine
description: A plant-based Moroccan dish featuring refried beans in a rich and spicy tagine sauce, served in a wok and perfect for a show-off dinner party. The refried beans are cooked to a jammy and shattering texture.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large wok over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Stir in the ground cumin and smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Add the canned diced tomatoes, refried beans, salt, and pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the water to the wok and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove the wok from the heat and let it cool slightly before serving.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
